response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified the performance as "Disintegration" by the VTuber Shishiro Botan based on the on-screen text "Disintegration" and the hashtag #獅白ぼたん生誕祭2025.
2. Performed a search for `"Disintegration" Shishiro Botan lyrics`.
3. Confirmed the original artist is Lia (associated with I've Sound).
4. The song is sung entirely in English, so the original language is English.
5. Extracted the lyrics from the on-screen text in the video, which matched the known lyrics of the song.
6. The second part of the video is non-musical dialogue, labeled as such.
response.global_summary: This video features a performance of the song "Disintegration" by VTuber Shishiro Botan during her 2025 birthday concert, followed by a dialogue segment in a Visual Novel style between Shishiro Botan and Raora Panthera.

scenes.description: VTuber Shishiro Botan performs the song "Disintegration" on a virtual stage. The song title appears in the top-left corner.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Forever has gone
Today is infinity
And yesterday's dreams
Today a faint memory
Forever has gone
Today is infinity
It's time to move on
Forever has gone
Two eyes in the face of billions of voices
I saw the flashing lights move further in the distance
The dream was not meant to be outside these walls that I have created
The sound of stars colliding
Echoes in the distance
And dreams they shatter
Let it break into a thousand pieces
Let the wind blow it all away
Dreams are fragile but our hearts grow stronger from the memories
Renew... the light... the dream...
